case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS AMERSON, VICTOR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $265.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT AMERSON, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
